image.alt: Portrait of Yatong holding a big fuwa Miku at Anime Expo 2025

bio.tagline: Brewing designs with a blend of what, why, & how thru a humanist lens.
paragraphs: For most of my school years, I studied East Asian Studies with a focus on Japanese culture. I found myself trying to figure out "what" and "why", but rarely proposing "how".
I wanted to move beyond analysis and get my hands dirty. To make and create. To answer the "how".

It may sounds cliché, but reading Don Norman's book 『 The Design of Everyday Things 』 gave me an Eureka moment. I was fascinated by how our life experiences are shaped by deliberate choices that are often invisible to us (a hallmark of good design!).
Human-centered design felt like the missing piece of my intellectual pursuit, as it is an interdisciplinary field that combines discovery, analysis and problem-solving.
And that, my friend, is how I met UX design.

milestones.title: UX Designer
milestones.subtitle: US Department of Agriculture (contracted via Spatial Front, Inc.)

strengths.title: Navigating Complexity
strengths.description: I ramp up quickly in complex domains (eg. B2B enterprise and science) and feel comfortable working within data-rich systems.

strengths.title: Curation & Judgment
strengths.description: I know what's worth keeping. I curate resources with a designer's eye, filtering noise and restructuing messiness into usable systems.

strengths.title: System Thinking
strengths.description: I connect the dots across systems thru a bigger picture lens, distilling insights from thorough research and structured analysis.

strengths.title: Language Clarity
strengths.description: Vague terms breed miscommunication. I operate at the level of meaning with a sensitivity to words that comes from years of foreign language study.

strengths.title: AI + Code Fluency
strengths.description: I bridge design and engineering through frontend development knowledge, and I actively experiment with AI to design and vibe code.

strengths.title: UX Advocacy
strengths.description: I influence teams to prioritize UX through strategic communication, and driving high engagement and buy-in.
